response.justification: While Sarah possesses excellent technical skills and extensive experience in software development, engineering productivity, and developer tooling, her resume lacks any evidence of formal people management. As this is a Level II Manager role focused on full-time people leadership, 1:1s, and performance expectations, her heavily Individual Contributor (IC) focused background does not meet the core management requirements.
strengths: Over 15 years of software development experience across multiple tech stacks.
Significant experience building developer tools, test automation, and CI/CD pipelines.
Demonstrated technical leadership and initiative as a Staff Engineer and Founder.
concerns: Zero explicit experience in formal people management, conducting 1:1s, or performance reviews.
Lacks demonstrated experience in driving organizational change or managing large teams.
Recent roles are highly focused on hands-on coding and individual contributions rather than management.
